hooks.command: TASK_ID=$(jq -r '.tool_input.task_id // .tool_input.id // .tool_input.taskId // empty'); case "$TASK_ID" in 86d2899n5|86d289c19|86d289j7m|86d289j9h|86d289ja7|86d289jav|86d289jbz|86d289jca) exit 0 ;; *) echo 'BLOCKED: Direct task writes are prohibited. Only Sprint Readiness dashboard rows may be updated.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
echo 'BLOCKED: Creating tasks is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Deleting tasks is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Moving tasks is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying task tags is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying task tags is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying task dependencies is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying task dependencies is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying task links is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying task links is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying list membership is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying list membership is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2

TASK_ID=$(jq -r '.tool_input.task_id // .tool_input.id // .tool_input.taskId // empty'); case "$TASK_ID" in 86d2899n5|86d289c19|86d289j7m|86d289j9h|86d289ja7|86d289jav|86d289jbz|86d289jca) exit 0 ;; *) echo 'BLOCKED: Creating task comments is prohibited outside Sprint Readiness tasks.' >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying lists is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Creating lists is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Creating lists is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2

echo 'BLOCKED: Creating folders is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Adding time entries is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Time tracking is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
echo 'BLOCKED: Time tracking is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2

echo 'BLOCKED: Modifying reminders is prohibited.' >&2; exit 2
